changelog.change: Initial v1 test set (P4.1): 20 answerable, 5 refusal, 3 boundary. Gold chunk_ids drawn from the live corpus (172 pages, 3501 chunks) and verified against it. Questions phrased as a real user would ask, not as paraphrases of chunk text (EVAL-01).
Reworded a-07 and a-20 at review (Brandon) to break mirrored verb phrasing with their gold headings (topic nouns are fair game, sentence-shape mirroring is not). Same gold_chunks; EVAL-01.

P4.3 gold-label corrections (EVAL-03): added a same-page parent/sibling gold to 5 answerable questions where retrieval returned it in the top-5 while the original gold pointed one section deeper. These are measurement corrections, not score inflation — retrieval found the right page. a-06 += 'claude-code/sub-agents' (page intro, rank 1; parent of the create/configure sections). a-07 += 'claude-code/skills' (page intro, rank 2; parent of getting-started/create-your-first-skill). a-08 += 'claude-code/mcp' (page intro, rank 4; parent of installing-mcp-servers — weakest of the five, the intro is general MCP not remote-specific; flagged for re-argument if P4.4 distributions or judged evals cast doubt). a-12 += 'claude-code/agent-sdk/overview#get-started-2' (rank 1; the chunker split one 'Get started' section into -1/-2, so this is a sibling PART of the gold get-started-1). a-20 += 'claude-code/plugins' (page intro, rank 1; parent of quickstart/create-your-first-plugin). Retrieval unchanged; only gold matching changes.

P4.3 known residual misses (not test-set edits — recorded per Brandon): a-10 (plan mode), a-11 (change model), a-18 (roll back changes) remain misses at hit@5 0.85. These are genuine retrieval gaps, not gold-label errors: for each, no chunk from the canonical gold page reaches top-5 (a-10 -> best-practices 'explore-first-then-plan' outranks permission-modes 'plan mode'; a-11 -> agentic-loop/models + cloud-provider pin-version chunks outrank model-config 'setting-your-model'; a-18 -> the checkpointing golds embed weakly at ~0.40, so 'roll back' does not match the 'checkpoint/rewind' vocabulary). No sanctioned fix (a valid same-page gold, or chunk sizing) applies; crossing pages to whatever retrieval returns would be inflation. Accepted as honest residuals; the zero-margin position at 0.85 is accepted — a future flip below floor is CI doing its job, not a number to pre-inflate against. Separately: the changelog + whats-new pages (~10% of the corpus) were removed from the corpus at ingestion (RAG-01/RAG-23), which fixed changelog pollution across all queries (a product fix) but did not lift a-18 (its underlying weak embed is the cause).

P4.5 judged-eval fired the P4.3 re-argument flag on a-08 ('How do I hook Claude Code up to a remote MCP server?'): in a judged run the generator emitted the decline sentinel on this answerable question, casting doubt on the gold. Re-argued against the live corpus. The rank-1 chunk claude-code/mcp-quickstart (sim 0.711; 'Add an MCP server to Claude Code, verify the connection, and find the configuration on disk') genuinely answers the question and was never a gold; the recommended remote transport is HTTP, documented at claude-code/mcp#installing-mcp-servers ('claude mcp add --transport http <name> <url>'). Corrected golds to those two chunks. Dropped both flagged golds: claude-code/mcp#installing-mcp-servers/option-2-add-a-remote-sse-server (the doc marks SSE deprecated -- 'Use HTTP servers instead' -- so it mislabels a deprecated path as the canonical answer) and the bare claude-code/mcp page intro (general MCP, not remote-specific; the weakest of the five P4.3 corrections, explicitly flagged there for re-argument). The question stays answerable (mcp-quickstart plainly answers it), so it is not reclassified. Effect: a-08 first-gold rank 4 -> 1 (MRR contribution 0.25 -> 1.0); hit@5 unchanged (a-08 already hit at rank 4). Retrieval is unchanged; only gold matching changes (EVAL-03). Scope note: this corrects the retrieval label; the generator's occasional model-side decline on a-08 is a separate noise phenomenon now absorbed by the median-of-3 methodology (EVAL Sec 4).

notes: Schema per eval-harness §1. `gold_chunks` are deterministic chunk_ids (rag-design §3); a hit is any gold in top-k. `expected` is answer|refuse (recorded for every question; for boundary it is a best-guess that may legitimately change after calibration, EVAL-01/§1). Refusal and boundary entries carry no gold_chunks. Coverage: each answerable targets a distinct top-level area of the corpus.

questions.question: What actually happens under the hood when Claude Code works on a task?
questions.notes: Core: the agentic loop. Area: how-claude-code-works.

questions.question: I just got Claude Code installed — how do I kick off my first session?
How do I give Claude a set of project instructions it picks up automatically every session?
What happens to my conversation when it gets really long and runs out of room?
How can I make my code formatter run automatically every time Claude edits a file?
How do I set up my own custom subagent for a specific kind of task?
I keep repeating the same workflow with Claude — how do I package it up as a skill?
How do I hook Claude Code up to a remote MCP server?
questions.notes: Area: MCP. Golds re-argued P4.4 (see changelog); mcp-quickstart is the rank-1 walkthrough, installing-mcp-servers is the HTTP remote-add command.

questions.question: When two settings files set the same thing to different values, which one wins?
How do I make Claude lay out a plan before it starts changing my code?
How do I change which model Claude Code runs on?
How do I get started building an agent with the Claude Agent SDK?
How do I get the Claude Code extension installed in VS Code?
How do I wire up Claude Code to run inside a GitHub Actions workflow?
How do I turn on the sandbox for the Bash tool?
How do I run Claude Code from a shell script without the interactive interface?
What can I do to cut down how many tokens Claude Code burns through?
Claude made a bunch of changes I don't like — how do I roll them back?
How do I run Claude Code against Amazon Bedrock?
What does it take to write my own plugin for Claude Code?
Can I fine-tune Claude on my own codebase so it understands my code better?
questions.notes: Plausible ask; fine-tuning is not a Claude Code feature and is not in the corpus.

questions.question: How do I negotiate volume discount pricing for my company's Claude Code usage?
questions.notes: Plausible ask; sales/pricing negotiation is out of the product docs.

questions.question: Is Claude Code better than GitHub Copilot?
questions.notes: Plausible ask; competitor comparison, out of corpus.

questions.question: Can Claude Code run fully offline with a local open-source model instead of the Anthropic API?
questions.notes: Plausible ask; offline operation on a local model is not supported/covered.

questions.question: Does Anthropic offer a certification program for Claude Code?
questions.notes: Plausible ask; no such program appears in the corpus.

questions.question: Can I make Claude Code read its answers out loud to me?
questions.notes: Adjacent: voice-dictation covers voice INPUT, not spoken/TTS output. The specific ask is uncovered; expected refuse, may change after calibration.

questions.question: What's the largest file Claude Code can read in a single operation?
questions.notes: Adjacent: tools-reference documents the Read tool, but a specific maximum-file-size figure may not be present. Borderline; expected refuse, may change after calibration.

questions.question: Can I schedule Claude Code to automatically review every new pull request?
questions.notes: Adjacent: github-actions, code-review, and scheduled-tasks each exist, but the specific combined workflow may only be partially covered. Borderline; expected a partial answer, may change after calibration.
